examples: Objective: To investigate the effects of potentilla anserine polysaccharide (PAP) on metabolic product of arachidonic acid (AA) in murine splenocytes.
Objective: To study the protective effects and mechanisms of n-butanol fraction of Potentilla anserine L. on EAHY926 Endothelial cells in hypoxia injury .
Objectives: To study the inhibition and mechanisms of n-butanol fraction of Potentilla anserine L. against hypoxia -induced calcium overload in myocardial cells.
